threads.subject: Re: PF/Clayco - Preliminary Contract Comments
threads.body_preview: Thanks Nick, Team, contract execution will enable several workstreams which need to happen over the next few months. As of now, these workstreams are on hold until the contracts are signed.
threads.full_thread_content: Courtney (2026-06-24T19:42): Thanks Nick, Team, contract execution will enable several workstreams which need to happen over the next few months. As of now, these workstreams are on hold until the contracts are signed. ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Courtney (2026-06-24T19:41): contract execution will enable several workstreams which need to happen over the next few months ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Ryan (2026-06-24T18:52): + @Conor Tighe @Catherine Swan [added legal team to thread] ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Ryan (2026-06-24T18:51): Nick – Given that its Wednesday (2PM Central) – we need some time to review wholesitically and meet internally before we meet externally. We are looking to do a quick turn – but need some time to evaluate. Let me get with Conor and Catherine and we can discuss. ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Nick Rivera (2026-06-24T18:31): urgency of completing the contract. To help keep things moving, we would like to arrange a meeting between our respective legal teams this Friday to discuss any remaining open items. ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Ryan FW to internal (2026-06-24T17:35): Heres the contract; let me know what comments we have - and if we can meet Friday - or if that is too early. ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Nick Rivera (2026-06-24T17:30): Ryan, Please see the attached redlines. Let me know if your team would be available sometime Friday to discuss.
threads.sent_body: Nick – Given that its Wednesday (2PM Central) – we need some time to review wholistically and meet internally before we meet externally. We are looking to do a quick turn – but need some time to evaluate. Let me get with Conor and Catherine and we can discuss.

threads.subject: Project Solis Earthwork Prebid Meeting
threads.body_preview: Team, I'm editing this meeting invite to be our full Earthwork prebid meeting with all of our team members and subcontractors. Meeting agenda: Contract and Approach, Scope of Work, Schedule and Sequencing, Logistics Plan, Long Lead items, Break Ground.
threads.full_thread_content: Chris Snyder (2026-06-24T20:55): Team, I'm editing this meeting invite to be our full Earthwork prebid meeting with all of our team members and subcontractors. Apologies for any confusion. Meeting agenda includes: Contract and Approach, Scope of Work, Schedule and Sequencing, Logistics Plan and Workflow, Long Lead items, Break Ground. Exhibit C - Subcontractor's Scope of Work - Combined Scope of Work Template - Overall Scope Requirements - Civil Scope.

threads.subject: [EXTERNAL] RE: Pac Fusion / Clayco - OCIP Materials
threads.body_preview: Oh, ok this is even more helpful. We were under the impression that this was in July. Therefore, from our standpoint, while the OCIP will be in place for your July 1 start – it won't be in place for the first 1-2 weeks on site.
threads.full_thread_content: Sarah Shepard Baldwin (2026-06-22T14:09): Oh, ok this is even more helpful. We were under the impression that this was in July. Therefore, while the OCIP will be in place for your July 1 start – it won't be in place for the first 1-2 weeks on site. ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Ryan (2026-06-22T14:06): We don't know who the subcontractors are yet; we don't anticipate being onsite until mid August with earthwork. Currently doing buyout at the moment. Earthwork — maybe $3mm or so; Ground improvement is being evaluated. ---MESSAGE BREAK--- Ryan (2026-06-22T13:47): First 1-2 weeks is primarily Earthwork for the most part. Maybe geopiers / ground improvements. That should be all for first few weeks.
threads.sent_body: We don't know who the subcontractors are yet; we don't anticipate being onsite until mid August with earthwork. Currently doing buyout at the moment and there are multiple subcontractors still in the mix.

threads.subject: [EXTERNAL] RE: Pac Fusion / OCIP Quote Review
threads.body_preview: Noted, that is stressful. We plan to push back binding to July 1, and understand that you will not be on site that week. Be in touch when you can and note that I will be out the week of the 4th.
